author: tim-hub
description: Take Bible study notes easily. Automatically suggests Bible verses as references.

manifest.author: tim-hub
manifest.description: Taking Bible Study note in Obsidian.md application easily. Automatically suggesting Bible Verses as references.
manifest.name: Bible Reference

name: Bible Reference

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* chore(deps): bump the npm_and_yarn group across 1 directory with 2 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/tim-hub/obsidian-bible-reference/pull/345
* chore(deps): bump fast-uri from 3.1.0 to 3.1.2 in the npm_and_yarn group across 1 directory by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/tim-hub/obsidian-bible-reference/pull/346
* Header Shows Wrong Verse Number When Using Abbreviated Book Names by @AlphaHasher in https://github.com/tim-hub/obsidian-bible-reference/pull/350

releases.description:

* fix: line break in cross-chapter and skipped verse formatting by @Marvive in https://github.com/tim-hub/obsidian-bible-reference/pull/318

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ## What's Changed * Logos URIs by @Marvive in https://github.com/tim-hub/obsidian-bible-reference/pull/306 - to support to use Logos as a sournce of external reference * **Broken Change** - Refactor reference link by @tim-hub in https://github.com/tim-hub/obsidian-bible-reference/pull/307 - to Refactor UI to remove some settings, if you previously use BLB version or Logos toggle for external link reference on head or bottom, now you need to change to use this dropdown, this is first broken change we have introduced so far, the reason is that we really want to simplify our software to reduce the complexity and duplication, this also give us the flexibility to switch to other reference source for study in the future. ## New Contributors Thanks for the work you have done for bring Logos as one of the source of reference. * @Marvive made their first contribution in https://github.com/tim-hub/obsidian-bible-reference/pull/306 * @jonzfisher https://github.com/tim-hub/obsidian-bible-reference/pull/302 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tim-hub/obsidian-bible-reference/compare/25.12.13...v25.12.21 --- BTW, thanks all for all users of obsidian bible reference, thanks for you support, love and help for this plugin. This release will be most likely the last release of 2025, I could not believe it that this small plugin has been 3 years and has been release 102 times, 47k downloads in total. Again, thank you all. Merry Xmas and Happy New Year.
releases.name: v25.12.21

releases.description:
- bug fix for multiple verse selection https://github.com/tim-hub/obsidian-bible-reference/issues/249
- use @ instead of - for translation selection

So if we don't want to use default translation, for example we want to pick esv version, we can type `--john1:1@esv`

Closing issues #180 #182 

- Add Tamil translation
- Allow users to use ++ as a trigger, especially for iOS users, iOS users can use ++ instead of turn off Smart Punctuation.


![](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/2884320/330972017-cb2c454c-9aa6-4776-8771-7e2c11f078b5.png?jwt=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..someV_CEX5YbZSF_pnRbUTrJrVwe35kuWvOwF4hNc0Q)
